title: platycerium alcicorne
intro: Platycerium alcicorne, also known as the Elkhorn Coral Fern or the Staghorn Fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Australia, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various ailments. Consuming extracts from this plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Platycerium alcicorne can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used to support immune function and relieve coughs.
